title: Un Rettai Jadai Kupiduthe Lyrics Paakkanum Pola Irukku
stanzas: <div>Un Retta Sada Koopiduthe Lyrics Paakkanum Pola Irukku

[Un retta sada
koopiduthe muththammaa
un pinnaale naan
vaaren kuththammaa.

thenna oala keeththu
nee seeraga sambaa naathu
nandhavana kaathu
un nadaya konjam maathu

Un retta sada
koopiduthe muththammaa
un pinnaale naan
vaaren kuththammaa.

ooroaram kammakulla
oththayila pogayila
oththaasa pannungannu
oththa kaalil ninnavale(2)

adi aadi poyi aavanai
appuramaa paaru nee
pudhukottai kaari nee
pullathaatchi aava nee

manakkura soapu
nee malligappu thoppu
nambugiren paappu
nee vachiraadha aappu

thakkaali thottathula
thanni paatcha pogayila
..kaali unnaala
.... thorakkalaye(2)

pappaali thottathula
pazham parikka pogayila
kannazhagi unnaala
kaai parichi vandhen

singaporu seela
enna suthikadi maela
vandhuruchu velai
nana podaporen maala.

Un retta sada
koopiduthe muththammaa
un pinnaale naan
vaaren kuththammaa.

thenna oala keeththu
nee seeraga sambaa naathu
nandhavana kaathu
un nadaya konjam maathu

Un retta sada
koopiduthe muththammaa
un pinnaale naan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the longing for a loved one, capturing the essence of love.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Paakkanum Pola Irukku, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The singer and music director for Un Rettai Jadai Kupiduthe are currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 26, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Rettai Jadai Kupiduthe, the protagonist expresses his deep affection and longing for his beloved. The song's romantic theme is beautifully woven into the narrative of Paakkanum Pola Irukku, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationship. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track is perfect for celebrating love during special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Rettai Jadai Kupiduthe from Paakkanum Pola Irukku is a captivating melody that beautifully encapsulates the essence of romance. The song's enchanting lyrics and soothing rhythm create a nostalgic vibe that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of this heartfelt track that celebrates love in its purest form.
stanzaMeanings: I am coming behind you, my dear, calling you with love.
What should I do with your beautiful eyes, my dear?
You should listen to the call of the land and change your steps a little.
I am coming behind you, my dear, calling you with love.
What should I do with your beautiful eyes, my dear?
In the village, they say to work hard and not to waste time.
Look at him, he has gone away, you should see him, you are the new beauty.
You are like a fragrant flower, I believe you are the one who brings joy.
There, the blacksmith is making a pot, it shines like a jewel.
In the tomato garden, the water is flowing, you are not showing up because of your laziness.
In the fruit garden, the fruits are ripe, my dear, I have come to pick them because of you.
Singapore is a place where I have come to work, I will go and do my job now.
I am coming behind you, my dear, calling you with love.
What should I do with your beautiful eyes, my dear?
You should listen to the call of the land and change your steps a little.
I am coming behind you, my dear, calling you with love.
What should I do with your beautiful eyes, my dear?
